desk_action: Do not add directional exposure; monitor until the benchmark moves outside the forecast band.
decision_rationale: Benchmark 107.57 sits inside the peakload forecast band (104.02-135.56 EUR/MWh), so there is no directional conviction.
invalidation_logic: Invalidate or resize the signal if updated load, wind, or solar forecasts materially change residual load; if outage, flow, or market-regime news changes the supply stack; if recent model error exceeds validation error; or if liquidity/execution prices differ materially from the benchmark.
